name: South Korea
summary: Day 68 Wednesday. **KOSPI BROKE 7,000 — OPENED 7,093.01, ROSE TO ~7,400.32 BY MID-MORNING; SAMSUNG ELECTRONICS CROSSED $1 TRILLION MARKET CAP (ONLY SECOND ASIAN COMPANY AFTER TSMC).** Apple held exploratory talks with Samsung and Intel to produce chips for Apple devices in the US — potential diversification beyond TSMC drove Samsung +13-15% on session. SK Hynix added another ~10%. Combined Samsung + SK Hynix concentration hit RECORD 42.2% of KOSPI (May 5). KOSPI +6.7% 1D / +37.6% 1M / +45.4% 3M = the cleanest STRUCTURAL VALIDATION of AI-cycle decoupling thesis the May 3-5 briefs introduced. The May 4-6 sequence — Iran multi-axis kinetic restart May 4, Korean-flagged HMM Namu damaged in Hormuz, then KOSPI +6.7% to record on May 6 — is the structural decoupling event. USD/KRW -1.4% to ₩1,454.68 (-3.5% 1M) on broad EM-FX strength + DXY -0.4%. AI capex demand has structurally separated from West Asia geopolitics for major Asian tech exporters; same is NOT true for Asian importers (India). Helium-cascade thesis remains FALSIFIED at tier-1 chipmaker level (Samsung Q1 + SK Hynix Apr 23 framings hold). For deployment: Korea is overweight in AI-cycle bifurcation thesis vs Indian-equity allocation.

active_triggers.condition: Samsung or SK Hynix announces production halt due to helium shortage
